info.title: Salesforce Apex REST API
info.description: Framework for exposing custom Apex classes as RESTful web service endpoints on the Salesforce platform. Apex REST services are defined using the @RestResource, @HttpGet, @HttpPost, @HttpPatch, @HttpPut, and @HttpDelete annotations. Custom endpoints are accessible at /services/apexrest/{urlMapping}. This spec describes the framework's structure and the built-in endpoint for executing anonymous Apex.

get.summary: Call a custom Apex REST GET endpoint
get.description: Invokes the @HttpGet annotated method on the Apex class mapped to this URL. The response format depends on the Apex implementation. URL path parameters beyond the base mapping are available to the Apex code via RestContext.request.requestURI.

parameters.name: urlMapping
parameters.description: The URL mapping defined in the @RestResource annotation (e.g., '/Accounts/*', '/Cases/*')

200.description: Response from the Apex REST service. Format depends on the implementation.

schema.description: Response varies based on the Apex REST service implementation

404.description: No Apex REST service found for the specified URL mapping

post.summary: Call a custom Apex REST POST endpoint
post.description: Invokes the @HttpPost annotated method on the Apex class mapped to this URL. The request body is deserialized and passed to the method. Supports JSON and XML request bodies.

requestBody.description: Request body consumed by the Apex REST service. Structure depends on the implementation.

200.description: Response from the Apex REST service

schema.description: Response varies based on the Apex REST service implementation

201.description: Resource created by the Apex REST service

schema.description: Response varies based on the Apex REST service implementation

patch.summary: Call a custom Apex REST PATCH endpoint
patch.description: Invokes the @HttpPatch annotated method on the Apex class mapped to this URL.

200.description: Response from the Apex REST service

schema.description: Response varies based on the Apex REST service implementation

put.summary: Call a custom Apex REST PUT endpoint
put.description: Invokes the @HttpPut annotated method on the Apex class mapped to this URL.

200.description: Response from the Apex REST service

schema.description: Response varies based on the Apex REST service implementation

delete.summary: Call a custom Apex REST DELETE endpoint
delete.description: Invokes the @HttpDelete annotated method on the Apex class mapped to this URL.

200.description: Response from the Apex REST service

oauth2.description: Salesforce OAuth 2.0. The connected app must have API access enabled.

scopes.api: Access and manage your Salesforce data

tags.name: Custom Endpoints
tags.description: Custom Apex REST web service endpoints defined with @RestResource annotation
